title: World Edit optimized
description: Want to use world edit with NO LAG? Download now!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb041748fd807bbb2cb4ecb9ebf6ae0181a527ae.jpeg)

World Edit Optimized is a performance-focused modpack designed to enhance the 'World Edit' mod. Whether you're a creative builder, map maker, or server admin, this modpack reduces lag and adds quality-of-life improvements to help you build faster!

**🛠️ Features:**

- Optimized performance

- Addons and tweaks

- Lightweight and stable
